raw_response:
Agreeing with agent1’s assessment based on the known mechanism whereby nitric oxide stimulates guanylate cyclase activity resulting in higher concentrations of cGMP, thus facilitating smooth muscle relaxation. There isn't any evidence suggesting magnesium plays a direct role as a secondary messenger in this context.

Agree **Answer**: C.
